en.title: Gold Rate Today, July 1: Check 18, 22 and 24 carat gold prices in Chennai, Mumbai, Delhi, Kolkata and other cities
en.desc: Today's 18, 22 and 24 Carat Gold Prices in Chennai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Delhi: The gold price in India today, July 1, stands at Rs 14,078 per gram for 24 karat gold, Rs 12,905 per gram for 22 karat gold and Rs 10,559 per gram for 18 karat gold.

en.title: Nio's June deliveries hit yearly high but Q2 misses guidance
en.desc: Nio Inc delivered 40,597 vehicles in June, up 62.88% year-on-year, setting a new monthly record so far this year.

en.title: Trump's crypto ventures earned over $1bn in 2025
en.desc: Report reveals US President Donald Trump earned over $1 billion from cryptocurrency ventures in 2025, significantly boosting his personal fortune.

en.title: Malaysia lures priced-out Hong Kong property buyers
en.desc: A growing number of Hongkongers are swapping small flats for larger homes and lower living costs in Malaysia.

en.title: Price Tracker: Oil, fuel monitor for June 30 - July 6
en.desc: Prices of oil and fuel products may either increase or decrease starting Tuesday, June 30.

en.title: Saudi PIF Operating Profit Doubles, Assets Hit $1.21 Trillion
en.desc: Saudi Arabia’s Public Investment Fund has put its 2025 financial performance under the spotlight of global markets, publishing its audited consolidated financial statements on the London Stock Exchange in a move that reinforces its role as a driver of economic transformation and a global investor across continents. The figures revealed an exceptional year for the fund. Net profit surged 152% to $17.36 billion, or 65.1 billion riyals, while total assets rose 5% to nearly $1.21 trillion, or 4.54 trillion riyals.

en.title: Mahindra Sales June 2026 - SUVs Cross 60k Mark, Overall Sales Up 37% YoY
en.desc: Mahindra records its highest-ever June SUV sales, while tractor business also posts double-digit growth despite concerns around emerging El Nino conditions

en.title: One New Zealand reveals next CEO as Jason Paris steps down
en.desc: The company's board chairperson said Paris' leadership over nearly eight years helped transform the company.

en.title: Yen sinks to four-decade low as dollar gets yields boost
en.desc: The dollar got a boost from a sharp rise in Treasury yields and pushed the yen to a 40-year trough on Wednesday.

en.title: Employers who laid off workers for AI are reversing their decisions
en.desc: Companies are realizing artificial intelligence can't do everything after all, prompting them to rehire employees to grow their businesses
